name: visionary-claude
description: Visual design plugin for Claude Code. 207 styles, 8-step selection + Verbalized Sampling (Stage 1.5), Latent Style Mixing slerp (Stage 2.5), Constraint-Injection (Stage 2.6) with 40 atomic rules, Cross-modal inputs (/visionary-from-photo, /visionary-from-track, /visionary-mood), 12 Cinematic director-packs (Wong Kar-wai, Villeneuve, Kubrick, ...), Cross-screen flow (5 koherenta states), Voice-tempo motion-refinement, Runtime context (circadian + network-aware + patina), Coined-styles auto-promotion. 9th anti-typicality critic mitigates RLHF mode-collapse (Zhang 2025). Motion Scoring 2.0, MLLM Judge, DINOv2 embeddings, Active Governance, Taste Inheritance designer-as-subagent, Structural-Integrity Gate, MCP-server for Cursor/Windsurf/Cline. axe-core-instrumented Playwright critique. WCAG 2.2 AA + APCA. 15 frameworks, 20+ languages.
